description_long: This is a large, luxurious residential house surrounded by a stone wall and featuring extensive landscaping, including trees, shrubs, and decorative planters. The house has a complex, multi-gabled dark gray roof with several chimneys and dormer windows, and its exterior walls are finished in a combination of light and dark materials. The front yard includes a circular driveway, a fountain, and a covered carport, while the backyard boasts a spacious swimming pool, a poolside pergola, and two glass conservatories or greenhouses. Multiple patios and outdoor seating areas are visible, as well as a variety of garden features and pathways. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with arched and rectangular shapes, and the main entryway is accentuated by columns and a prominent porch. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating an elegant and inviting appearance.
description: A large, elegant house with a multi-gabled dark roof, landscaped grounds, a pool, and glass conservatories, surrounded by a stone wall. Features include symmetrical windows, a columned entryway, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, a circular driveway, fountain, and covered carport.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the landscaped garden, outdoor seating areas, and one of the glass conservatories.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, poolside pergola, and two glass conservatories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, additional garden areas, and the carport structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, prominent columns, a covered porch, and decorative landscaping.
